category_sources: Official GitHub README says dhcpdump parses DHCP packets from a network interface.
source_facts.description says it monitors DHCP traffic for debugging purposes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository for dhcpdump.
docs_sources: GitHub redirects source_facts.repo to the official dhcpdump-org/dhcpdump repository.
Official GitHub repository README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/bbonev/dhcpdump; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes parsing DHCP packets from an interface and pcap-related changes.
